user_query: I'm conducting research on the relationship between weather conditions and supermarket sales. Can you provide me with data on supermarket sales in three different cities, along with the corresponding weather conditions during that period? Moreover, I'm interested in the top IT certifications that are in demand in the retail industry.

TaskList.description: Gather supermarket sales data for three different cities over a specified period.
Collect weather condition data for the same cities and period as the sales data.
Analyze and correlate the gathered supermarket sales data with the corresponding weather condition data.
Research the top IT certifications that are currently in demand in the retail industry.
Compile and summarize the findings from the analysis and the research on IT certifications.
